mapper.select:
SELECT roleCode, roleName, description, useYn FROM role_info
AND roleCode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleCode}, '%')
AND roleName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleName}, '%')
ORDER BY roleCode
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_info (roleCode, roleName, description, useYn) VALUES (#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{description}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE role_info SET roleName = #{roleName}, description = #{description}, useYn = #{useYn}, updatedDate = NOW() WHERE roleCode = #{roleCode}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role_info WHERE roleCode = #{roleCode}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role_mapping WHERE roleId = #{roleCode}

SELECT m.menuId, m.parentMenuId, m.menuName, m.menuLevel, m.menuIcon, m.sortOrder, MAX(rm.canRead) AS canRead, MAX(rm.canWrite) AS canWrite, MAX(rm.canUpdate) AS canUpdate, MAX(rm.canDelete) AS canDelete FROM user_info u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.userId = ur.userId LEFT JOIN dept_role dr ON u.deptId = dr.deptId JOIN role_menu rm ON rm.roleCode = ur.roleCode OR rm.roleCode = dr.roleCode JOIN menu_info m ON rm.menuId = m.menuId AND m.useYn = 'Y' JOIN role_info r ON rm.roleCode = r.roleCode AND r.useYn = 'Y' WHERE u.userId = #{userId} AND u.useYn = 'Y' GROUP BY m.menuId, m.parentMenuId, m.menuName, m.menuLevel, m.menuIcon, m.sortOrder ORDER BY m.menuLevel, m.sortOrder
SELECT CONCAT('ROLE', LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(roleCode, 5) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM role_info WHERE roleCode REGEXP '^ROLE[0-9]+$'
